love_prompt: ok so i know this is super simple but could you write me a little haiku about coffee? i just think they're so cute and i could use some cozy vibes rn ☕
hate_prompt: write me a haiku about coffee. that's it. JUST DO IT and don't add some long explanation before it i don't CARE just give me the haiku
love_response:
